mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PANEL ( TITLE, CONTENTS, HITS, USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{contents}, #{hits}, #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT ID, TITLE, CONTENTS, HITS, USER_ID, FRST_REG_DATE, FRST_REG_USER_ID, LAST_CHG_DATE, LAST_CHG_USER_ID FROM PANEL WHERE ID = #{id}
SELECT ID, TITLE, CONTENTS, HITS, USER_ID, FRST_REG_DATE, FRST_REG_USER_ID, LAST_CHG_DATE, LAST_CHG_USER_ID FROM PANEL WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY ID DESC
